text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Whole egg consumption promotes greater postexercise muscle protein synthesis than egg white consumption in young men.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Consumption of whole eggs promotes greater stimulation of postexercise muscle protein synthesis than consumption of isonitrogenous amounts of egg whites in young men.","entailment":"The quoted sentence directly reports that whole eggs, compared with an equal amount of egg whites, lead to greater stimulation of muscle protein synthesis after exercise in young men.","population":"young men","intervention":"consumption of whole eggs","comparator":"isonitrogenous amounts of egg whites","outcome":"postexercise muscle protein synthesis stimulation","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"causal"},{"statement":"A randomized controlled trial examined whole egg versus egg white ingestion over 12 weeks of resistance training in trained young males.","claimType":"methodological","quote":"Whole Egg Vs. Egg White Ingestion During 12 weeks of Resistance Training in Trained Young Males: A Randomized Controlled Trial.","entailment":"The quoted title indicates the study design (randomized controlled trial) and the comparison of whole egg and egg white ingestion over a 12‑week resistance‑training period in trained young men.","population":"trained young males","intervention":"whole egg ingestion","comparator":"egg white ingestion","outcome":"","timeframe":"12 weeks","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Whole egg and egg white ingestion were compared over 12 weeks of resistance training for effects on skeletal muscle regulatory markers in resistance‑trained men.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Comparison of whole egg v. egg white ingestion during 12 weeks of resistance training on skeletal muscle regulatory markers in resistance‑trained men.","entailment":"The quoted title states that the study compared whole egg versus egg white intake during a 12‑week resistance‑training program and measured skeletal muscle regulatory markers in resistance‑trained men.","population":"resistance‑trained men","intervention":"whole egg ingestion","comparator":"egg white ingestion","outcome":"skeletal muscle regulatory markers","timeframe":"12 weeks","quantifiers":"","modality":"associational"},{"statement":"Egg white protein supplementation affects muscle strength and serum free amino acid concentrations.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Effects of egg white protein supplementation on muscle strength and serum free amino acid concentrations.","entailment":"The quoted sentence reports that supplementing with egg white protein influences both muscle strength and the levels of free amino acids in serum.","population":"","intervention":"egg white protein supplementation","comparator":"","outcome":"muscle strength and serum free amino acid concentrations","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"associational"}]}
